ValidationRule.description: Max_Teams_Notifications_Per_Invocation value must be a positive number no greater than 100.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: DeveloperName = 'Max_Teams_Notifications_Per_Invocation' && OR( NOT(ISNUMBER( Value__c )), VALUE( Value__c ) < 1, VALUE( Value__c ) > 100 )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: The value for Max Teams Notifications Per Invocation must be a number between 1 and 100.
